description_long: This is an adult human figure dressed in full tactical or military-style attire, featuring a camouflage-patterned uniform that covers the entire body. The individual wears a balaclava that conceals the head and most of the face, leaving only the eyes visible, and gloves that cover the hands. The uniform includes a utility vest with multiple pouches and a belt, suggesting readiness for carrying equipment or supplies. The pants are tucked into sturdy boots, and there are additional accessories such as a thigh holster or pouch strapped to the right leg. The overall appearance is that of a prepared, possibly security or military personnel, designed for urban or combat environments.
description: An adult figure in full tactical attire with a balaclava, utility vest, gloves, and boots, ready for urban or military scenarios.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full tactical outfit, balaclava, utility vest, gloves, and boots, with arms extended to the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the balaclava, the thickness of the vest, and a thigh holster or pouch strapped to the right leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest, the camouflage pattern, and the boots, with arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the holster or pouch on the right leg and the side profile of the uniform and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical uniform with balaclava, utility vest, gloves, and cargo pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
